method: Visualize using stratified box plots with age binned into 10-year groups (x-axis), churn_score (y-axis), and gender distinction via color. Overlay swarm plots to show density distribution.
objective: Compare churn propensity distributions across age groups and genders to identify high-risk demographics

method: Grouped bar charts with marital/partner status combinations as primary groups (x-axis), dependents status as sub-groups (color), and churn rate % (y-axis). Include statistical significance annotations.
objective: Identify interaction effects between family structure attributes on churn likelihood

method: Chloropleth map using city-level churn rates (color intensity) overlaid with kernel density estimation for spatial pattern analysis. Integrate population data via circle size encoding.
objective: Detect geographic clusters of high churn activity and assess urban/rural disparities

method: Back-to-back histogram with senior/non-senior churn counts. Add density curves and Cohen's d effect size measurement in annotations.
objective: Quantify disproportionate churn impact on elderly customer segment

method: Interactive matrix of small multiples: heatmaps showing churn category frequencies filtered by gender (rows) and partner status (columns). Enable cross-filtering via brush selection.
objective: Explore nuanced relationships between gender-specific social factors and churn reasons
